name: coding
description: Complete AI-powered project management with smart multi-agent coordination, conflict-free file operations, intelligent agent assignment, and real-time collaboration monitoring

commands.title: AI: Add or Improve Code Comments
📊 AI Code Quality Analysis - Current File

coding.autoApplyFixes.description: Automatically apply issue fixes without confirmation

coding.smartFileTemplates.description: Use intelligent templates for file generation

coding.smartDirectoryPlacement.description: Automatically place files in appropriate directories

coding.multiAgent.conflictPrevention.description: Enable file conflict prevention during multi-agent operations

coding.multiAgent.maxConcurrentOperation.description: Maximum number of concurrent file operations per agent

coding.multiAgent.enablePerformanceTrack.description: Track agent performance and optimize assignments

coding.coordination.showRealTimeUpdates.description: Show real-time coordination updates in sidebar

coding.coordination.conflictResolutionSt.description: Strategy for resolving file operation conflicts

coding.assignment.projectAwareness.description: Use project context for intelligent agent selection

coding.diagnostics.maxContextLines.description: Number of context lines to include when fixing diagnostics

coding.diagnostics.autoApplyFixes.description: Automatically apply diagnostic fixes without confirmation

coding.diagnostics.showDiffPreview.description: Show diff preview before applying fixes

coding.diagnostics.preferredModel.description: Preferred AI model for diagnostic fixes

coding.diagnostics.excludePatterns.description: File patterns to exclude from diagnostic processing

coding.security.autoFix.description: Automatically apply security fixes when available

coding.security.requestTimeout.description: Security scan request timeout in milliseconds

coding.security.enableRateLimiting.description: Enable rate limiting for security operations

coding.quality.enableAutoFix.description: Automatically apply code quality fixes when available

coding.quality.qualityThreshold.description: Minimum quality score threshold for acceptance

coding.advanced.logRetentionDays.description: Number of days to retain audit logs

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
